perturbation.original_text: This Agreement consists of this Sponsorship Agreement and Exhibits A and B hereto, each of which is incorporated into and forms a part of this Agreement by this reference.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement consists of this Sponsorship Agreement and Exhibit A hereto, which is incorporated into and forms a part of this Agreement by this reference. Exhibit B is for informational purposes only and does not constitute a binding part of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction regarding the status of Exhibit B. Section 4 defines 'Terms and Conditions' by referencing Exhibit B. By stating Exhibit B is non-binding, the applicability of the Terms and Conditions becomes uncertain, as benefits are subjected to this term in Section 5.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Except as expressly set forth in this Sponsorship Agreement or Exhibit A, all Benefits granted by Club to Sponsor hereunder shall be subject to, and Sponsor shall at times comply with, the terms and conditions set forth in the Terms and Conditions.
perturbation.justification: The changed text explicitly states that Exhibit B is 'for informational purposes only and does not constitute a binding part of this Agreement.' However, the contradicted text specifies that 'all Benefits granted by Club to Sponsor hereunder shall be subject to, and Sponsor shall at times comply with, the terms and conditions set forth in the Terms and Conditions,' where the 'Terms and Conditions' are defined by referencing Exhibit B as per the explanation. This directly contradicts the assertion that Exhibit B is non-binding, because section 5 states that Benefits are subjected to 'Terms and Conditions,' which are now uncertain.

perturbation.original_text: Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, as part of the consideration of the full and timely payment of the Sponsor Fees, Club hereby grants to Sponsor, and Sponsor hereby accepts, solely in the Territory, and during the Term: (i) the right to use the Benefits set forth on Exhibit A and the license and right to use the Team Marks solely in connection with the advertisement and promotion of Sponsor's Dick's Wings and Grill branded restaurants (the "Sponsor Business") in accordance with this Agreement; and (ii) the right to use the designation "Official Wings of the Jacksonville Jaguars" and such other designations as Club and Sponsor may agree to in a writing from time to time (collectively, the "Official Designations"), solely in connection with the Sponsor Business.
perturbation.changed_text: Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, including timely payment, Club grants Sponsor, solely in the Territory and during the Term, the right to use the Benefits on Exhibit A and Team Marks to promote Sponsor's Dick's Wings and Grill restaurants ("Sponsor Business"). The designation "Official Wings of the Jacksonville Jaguars" is granted only if Sponsor provides exceptional promotional support, as determined solely by Club's discretion.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces ambiguity by making the designation of "Official Wings of the Jacksonville Jaguars" conditional upon Sponsor's promotional support, assessed at Club's discretion. This contradicts the original agreement where it was part of the 'Sponsor Rights and Benefits' subject to fulfilling payment. This creates an in-text contradiction as it changes a guaranteed right into a discretionary benefit.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Sponsor Rights and Benefits. Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, as part of the consideration of the full and timely payment of the Sponsor Fees, Club hereby grants to Sponsor, and Sponsor hereby accepts, solely in the Territory, and during the Term: (i) the right to use the Benefits set forth on Exhibit A and the license and right to use the Team Marks solely in connection with the advertisement and promotion of Sponsor's Dick's Wings and Grill branded restaurants (the "Sponsor Business") in accordance with this Agreement; and (ii) the right to use the designation "Official Wings of the Jacksonville Jaguars" and such other designations as Club and Sponsor may agree to in a writing from time to time (collectively, the "Official Designations"), solely in connection with the Sponsor Business.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a condition (exceptional promotional support) for receiving the 'Official Wings of the Jacksonville Jaguars' designation, while the contradicted text clearly states this designation is granted as part of the 'Sponsor Rights and Benefits' in exchange for timely payment. This creates a direct conflict because the designation was originally guaranteed upon payment but is now subject to the Club's discretion, making the terms inconsistent and contradictory.

perturbation.original_text: Sponsor shall pay Club the Annual Fee for each Contract Year of this Agreement in six (6) equal installments, each due on or prior to the 1st of each month between June and November of the applicable Contract Year.
perturbation.changed_text: Sponsor shall endeavor to pay Club the Annual Fee for each Contract Year of this Agreement in six installments between June and November. While the intent is to make payments by the 1st of each month, delays are permissible provided Sponsor notifies Club.
perturbation.explanation: This perturbation changes the payment obligation from 'shall pay' to 'shall endeavor to pay,' weakening the binding nature of the payment schedule. It also introduces an allowance for delays, provided Club is notified. However, in Section 2 the contract states: Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, as part of the consideration of the full and timely payment of the Sponsor Fees, Club hereby grants to Sponsor, and Sponsor hereby accepts, solely in the Territory, and during the Term: This creates an in-text contradiction by making prompt payment a requirement for the contract to proceed, the section contradicts this requirement. If payment is not timely as required.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Sponsor Rights and Benefits. Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, as part of the consideration of the full and timely payment of the Sponsor Fees, Club hereby grants to Sponsor, and Sponsor hereby accepts, solely in the Territory, and during the Term: (i) the right to use the Benefits set forth on Exhibit A and the license and right to use the Team Marks solely in connection with the advertisement and promotion of Sponsor's Dick's Wings and Grill branded restaurants (the "Sponsor Business") in accordance with this Agreement; and (ii) the right to use the designation "Official Wings of the Jacksonville Jaguars" and such other designations as Club and Sponsor may agree to in a writing from time to time (collectively, the "Official Designations"), solely in connection with the Sponsor Business.
perturbation.justification: The changed text weakens the obligation for timely payments by changing 'shall pay' to 'shall endeavor to pay' and allowing for delays. This directly contradicts the 'Contradicted Text' which states that the Sponsor Rights and Benefits are granted as part of the consideration for the 'full and timely payment of the Sponsor Fees.' The allowance for delays in the changed text undermines the 'full and timely payment' condition in the Contradicted Text, creating a clear in-text contradiction.
